name: harness
description: Canonical, stack-agnostic Claude Code harness: the /spec skill (goal -> researched GitHub issue ready for @claude) and the /implement-pr skill (drive a mentioned PR to done — reconcile against drift as a pre-step, then implement & fix it merge-ready), plus generic code-reviewer and test-runner subagents. Shared across all of JDSavvy's repos; each project tailors stack-specific bits (build/test commands, anti-mixing guard ref, app skills) locally.
